content.en:
"The Nine-Star Early Stage Divine General, I am now fully qualified to transcend!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Detached from the Great Universe, the potential enhancement is far from being comparable to that of ordinary detached people.

However, once he is detached, there is no way to continue to improve at the level of the Divine General, and he will reach the Heavenly Mandate Realm long after the detachment, and he still has a lot of potential to tap now.

The Nine-Star Early Stage God General was far from his limit, and he even wanted to raise his strength to the peak of the Nine-Star Stage.

The greatest creation of the Innate Origin Land is the Innate Origin Pool, which is the great creation that created the ninth-order life, and Ye Tian has become a ninth-order life, so the Innate Origin Land is no longer relevant to him.

But the others were still eager to enter the Innate Origin Land, and as time passed, a Famous God General and Heavenly Monarch entered the Innate Origin Land one after another, and the ninth-order lifeforms that were born were also born one by one.

At this time, Ye Tian was in retreat and cultivating in the Void Heaven Palace.

this day.

The Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven Ancestor, the consciousness incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, came to the Void Heaven Hall and appeared in front of Ye Tian again.

"Master!"

Ye Tian bent down and said.

He was surprised why the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would come here again, after all, for Dao Ancestors, there were very few things that could attract their attention, even the Innate Origin Realm was far from enough to attract them.

It can even be said that the ancestral monument is useless to Dao Ancestor, but it is of great use to the forces under Dao Ancestor, and it is worthy of Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian came to see him before, because he was qualified to become a pro-Dao Ancestor, and the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor had to come forward.

But now, he couldn't figure out why the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor would take the initiative to see him again.

"Ye Tian, you are very good, you have stepped into the early stage of the Nine Stars in a short period of time, and the Void Heaven Dao Body has also made great progress. "

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor praised.

"Thank you for the compliment!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Ye Tian, I want to tell you this time that if you are sure, it is best to step into the ten-star god general and then go to transcendence, and at the very least, you also need to step into the nine-star peak god general. As a teacher, you can see that you have adventures, you have a lot of origin talents and extreme talents, and your comprehension talent is also very high, the nine-star peak is nothing to you, and your only disadvantage is resources. In the great universe, many rare resources are lacking, but as a Dao of the Void Heaven One Vein, you have the right to exchange and purchase some precious resources, so the Void Sky One Vein has enough qualifications to help you go further. Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said in a deep voice.

"Ten-star Divine General, Master, isn't the limit of the Divine General's level the nine-star peak?"

Ye Tian was shocked.

"No, the real limit is the ten-star god general, but the ten-star god general is almost a legend, after all, the nine-star peak is a luxury for the peerless Tianjiao, let alone a ten-star god general. But for countless years of chaos, although there are few ten-star gods, there are still some, but they are too old. In recent eras, there has not been a single ten-star god general, so no one knows that there is a ten-star god general above the nine-star peak god general. However, the ten-star gods will not distinguish between strong and weak, and they will not be able to improve their strength even if they step into the ten-star gods. Ye Tian, you are a native creature of the Great Universe, if you are detached from the Ten Star God General, your potential will be stronger than that of the Ten Star God General. And for the teacher to let you impact the ten-star god general, not for potential, but for an opportunity. You should know that if you want to become a Taoist ancestor, you must use the ancestral monument, if you don't have an ancestral monument, it is difficult to join the Tao at all. Although the Void Heaven Dao Body gives you a certain opportunity not to use the ancestral monument to join the Dao, it is speculation after all, and you can't even be sure if you are a teacher. But if you step into the ten-star god general, then you don't need to use the ancestral monument to join the way. "

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor revealed.

"What, the Ten Star Gods will be able to join the Tao without the need for an ancestral monument in the future!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank sharply, and he said incredulously.

"That's good!" the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor affirmed: "The potential of the Ten Star Divine Generals is unimaginable, and there is no need for the Ancestral Monument to join the Dao, it can be said that once you become a Ten Star Divine General, you will become a Dao Ancestor." In fact, using the ancestral monument to merge with the Dao is a helpless behavior, although you can become a Dao Ancestor, but to a certain extent, it wears out the foundation, and it is not a perfect Dao Ancestor, after becoming a Dao Ancestor, the strength will be very slow and slow. But relying on their own Dao Ancestors, each of them is an incomparably powerful existence, even if they are teachers, it is difficult to match such Dao Ancestors. It is a pity that the teacher originally stepped into the realm of the Heavenly Mandate with the nine-star peak god general, and it is a pity that he created the Void Heaven Dao Body, trying to cultivate a Dao Ancestor who relies on himself to join the Dao, and you are the most promising one. "

"Master, the disciple must do his best to attack the ten-star god general!"

Ye Tian assured.

"Just do your best, you have cultivated the Void Heaven Dao Body, if you evolve the Void Heaven Dao Body to a certain level, you may only need to be promoted to the level of a nine-star peak god general, and in the future, there are three or four percent of you who hope to rely on your own Dao Fusion to achieve the Dao Ancestor realm!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor didn't stay too long and left quickly.

But before leaving, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor instructed Ye Tian on the cultivation of the Void Heaven Dao Body.

After all, Ye Tian had been groping for the Void Heaven Dao Body by himself, and he didn't understand it in many aspects, and after the guidance of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian would progress faster in the future, at least in terms of inscribed Dao patterns, much faster than before.

In the following days, Ye Tian went all out to comprehend the Chaos Divine Power.

However, the Innate Origin Land was very lively, and hundreds of years later, the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden of the God of War Tower successfully stepped into the ninth-order life level with the help of the Innate Origin Pool, shocking many people.

The Left Wolf God of the Void Heaven One Vein also stepped into the ninth-order life after a thousand years, and stepped into the mid-nine-star god general combat power in one fell swoop.

However, the potential of the Left Wolf Divine General is only like this, but the mid-stage Nine-Star Divine General is much stronger than the Nine-Star Early Divine General, and the potential is much greater.

Don't underestimate this, the gap in the future may be the gap between the high-level true ancestor and the top true ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, 10,000 years have passed.

On this day, news came from the Innate Origin Land that the Innate Origin Pool had completely exhausted its energy.

However, more than twenty ninth-order lifeforms were born in the great universe, of which six were at the god general level, and the others were all Heavenly Monarchs.

Subsequently, a small number of Heavenly Monarchs and several Nine-Star Early Stage God Generals spent a huge price and left the Great Universe with the help of the power of the True Ancestors of the outside world, because their purpose was to use the Great Creation of the Innate Origin Land, and they didn't want to stay inside the Great Universe all the time.

However, there are still a large number of Heavenly Monarchs and Divine Generals who remain in the Great Universe, preparing for future opportunities.

"The left wolf god is gone!"

Ye Tian quickly got the news, but didn't pay much attention to it.

The Left Wolf God General obviously felt that the cultivation environment of the Great Universe was far inferior to Chaos, and he felt that he was not qualified to compete for the Ancestral Monument place, so he was unwilling to stay in the Great Universe.

After all, he is a god general, and there are three realms of Mandate of Heaven, True Spirit, and True Ancestor behind him, and he doesn't know how long it will take to become a true ancestor.

Not everyone has the same confidence as the Yunzi Divine Daughter, and the Left Wolf Divine General just has no confidence, he can become a nine-star divine general, it took countless years, and the real talent is not high.

After the left wolf god general left, Ye Tian's name on the god general list rose one place, and he became the first god general of the Void Heaven Temple again.
